title: GMS Week 1 - STASIS!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 10/01/2022
Image reference: 2022-01-10_gms-week-1-welcome-2022_img1.jpg
2022 begins with Omicron sweeping across the world, as global markets come increasingly under pressure and in a state of stasis (with this most recent surge). Moreover, Recyclers remain unsure as whether to push on or retreat further from the declines seen over the last month. Supply does remain stifled, but there is the growing feeling that Recyclers are not showing their true hand and as such, are likely lowballing offers in the hopes of acquiring a bargain or two (especially in Chattogram).
